general_knowledge_routing.description: Defines patterns for routing queries directly to the GENERAL knowledge track (LLM world knowledge). Checked BEFORE the main datasource router to save API token costs.

strong_general_indicators.description: If a query matches ANY of these phrases, route to the GENERAL track immediately.

general_knowledge_routing.llm_fallback_instruction: If none of the above heuristic indicators match the incoming query, pass the query to the main LLM router layer (gpt-4o-mini) to decide between DB, FILES, API, and GENERAL based on semantic context.
